global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central graphic and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a trending service with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, possibly a circle and a square, with a dark background.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape, likely a circle, positioned within the main graphic element.

elements.label: Overlay graphic
elements.description: An overlay graphic that adds depth to the main visual, possibly with varying opacity.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element located at the bottom of the ad, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Watch what's trending Start free today' in a prominent position at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending Start free today

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'StarVault' displayed at the top in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Order now' positioned at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A price label displaying '$4.99' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: Text labeled 'UGC' in a small font at the top, indicating user-generated content.
